positive: A stylized and symmetrical celestial tapestry featuring a magnificent, oversized crescent moon surrounded by nebulae swirls in deep sapphire blue, ethereal violet, and radiant gold. Below the moon, a collection of stylized constellations, including the Great Bear and Orion, are depicted as intricate glowing lines connecting simple, abstract geometric stellar points. The overall composition must be clean, high-contrast, and designed to look like a vibrant, mystical engraving suitable for a t-shirt print. Minimalist black outlines should define the star boundaries. Dramatic backlighting makes the nebulae glow softly against a deep, solid black background. Intricate, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, cropped, lowres, poor detail, jpeg artifacts, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise
